topic: A Sanad office in Muscat moved 40 client work permits off WhatsApp — no missed renewals in six months
format: Open with a SmartPro Hub product capability, then show the real-world business outcome it enables
post:
40 client work permits. One Sanad office in Muscat. Zero missed renewals across six months.

Not from adding headcount. Not from a better spreadsheet.

From pulling every permit out of WhatsApp and into SmartPro Hub's work permit tracking — where deadlines are visible, alerts fire automatically, and nothing expires because someone's phone was on silent during a long weekend.

Before the switch, this team ran their process the way most Sanad offices do: chasing updates across group chats, manually cross-checking dates, hoping nothing slipped while everyone was off for a public holiday.

Six months later — zero missed renewals. Every client permit in one place. Status visible without sending a single follow-up message.

This is exactly what we built Sanad office management software for. The risk was never forgetting a date. It's not having anything that remembers it for you.

If your permit tracking still lives in a chat thread, that's a liability with a countdown on it.

How many active permits is your team carrying right now — and how sure are you nothing is quietly expiring?

Book a 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=product-proof
